topWPAPlays.description: Jim Jarvis homers (1) on a fly ball to right field. Mike Yastrzemski scores.
Jake Mangum doubles (10) on a line drive to right fielder Mike Yastrzemski. Nick Gonzales scores. Jared Triolo to 3rd.
Mike Yastrzemski hits a grand slam (6) to right field. Matt Olson scores. Drake Baldwin scores. Dominic Smith scores.
Jake Mangum homers (2) on a fly ball to right field. Jared Triolo scores.
Jared Triolo lines out to first baseman Matt Olson.
Carson Benge singles on a fly ball to center fielder Lane Thomas. A.J. Ewing scores. Juan Soto scores. Carson Benge to 3rd. Throwing error by center fielder Lane Thomas.
Tyrone Taylor homers (6) on a fly ball to left center field.
Bobby Witt Jr. homers (13) on a fly ball to left field.
Jared Young doubles (5) on a fly ball to right fielder Jac Caglianone. Carson Benge scores.
Lane Thomas homers (7) on a fly ball to left field.
Umpire reviewed (home run), call on the field was upheld: Ben Rice homers (27) on a fly ball to right field. Trent Grisham scores.
Ryan McMahon doubles (6) on a line drive to right fielder Ryan Vilade. Max Schuemann scores.
Junior Caminero homers (27) on a fly ball to right center field.
Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to first baseman Cody Bellinger. Nick Fortes scores. Yandy Díaz to 3rd. Jonathan Aranda out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.
Max Schuemann doubles (5) on a line drive to left fielder Chandler Simpson.
Cubs challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Jeremiah Jackson doubles (9) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong. Gunnar Henderson scores. Pete Alonso scores.
Seiya Suzuki homers (15) on a fly ball to left field.
Seiya Suzuki doubles (13) on a ground ball to left fielder Taylor Ward. Pete Crow-Armstrong scores.
Pete Crow-Armstrong doubles (15) on a fly ball to center fielder Leody Taveras, deflected by right fielder Tyler O'Neill.
Nico Hoerner reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Gunnar Henderson.
Brayan Rocchio doubles (14) on a ground ball to left fielder Trevor Larnach. Patrick Bailey scores. Steven Kwan scores.
Chase DeLauter homers (9) on a fly ball to right field.
Tristan Gray singles on a sharp ground ball to right fielder Kahlil Watson. Royce Lewis scores. Alan Roden to 3rd. Luke Keaschall to 2nd.
Gabriel Arias homers (5) on a fly ball to center field.
Trevor Larnach called out on strikes.
Caleb Durbin homers (9) on a fly ball to left field. Romy Gonzalez scores.
Andrew Benintendi singles on a soft ground ball to catcher Connor Wong. Luisangel Acuña scores. Chase Meidroth to 2nd.
Sam Antonacci grounds out softly, second baseman Anthony Seigler to first baseman Brett Harris.
Ceddanne Rafaela grounds out, shortstop Luisangel Acuña to first baseman Miguel Vargas.
Miguel Vargas flies out to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela.
Zach McKinstry homers (4) on a fly ball to right center field. Kerry Carpenter scores.
Jake Rogers homers (3) on a fly ball to left field.

Joshua Kuroda-Grauer grounds into a double play, third baseman Kevin McGonigle to second baseman Hao-Yu Lee to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Jeff McNeil out at 2nd. Joshua Kuroda-Grauer out at 1st.
Lawrence Butler hit by pitch. Jacob Wilson to 2nd.
Jacob Wilson strikes out on a foul tip.
Liam Hicks doubles (9) on a ground ball to right fielder Luke Raley. Jakob Marsee scores.
Otto Lopez triples (6) on a ground ball to left fielder Randy Arozarena. Leo Jiménez scores. Liam Hicks scores.
Griffin Conine homers (4) on a fly ball to right field.
Dominic Canzone grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Kyle Stowers. J.P. Crawford to 3rd. Randy Arozarena out at 2nd. Dominic Canzone out at 1st.

Marlins challenged (force play), call on the field was overturned: Liam Hicks reaches on a fielder's choice. Jakob Marsee scores. Leo Jiménez to 2nd. Throwing error by shortstop Colt Emerson. Missed catch error by shortstop Colt Emerson, assist to first baseman Josh Naylor.
Justin Crawford singles on a ground ball to right fielder Noelvi Marte. Derek Hill scores.
Noelvi Marte grounds out, third baseman Alec Bohm to first baseman Bryce Harper.
Eugenio Suárez strikes out swinging.
Tyler Stephenson strikes out swinging.
JJ Bleday singles on a line drive to center fielder Justin Crawford.
Jordan Walker homers (22) on a fly ball to left field. JJ Wetherholt scores. Alec Burleson scores.
Iván Herrera walks. JJ Wetherholt to 2nd.
Jake Bauers homers (17) on a line drive to right field. Jackson Chourio scores. Brice Turang scores.
Cooper Pratt singles on a ground ball to center fielder Nathan Church. Andrew Vaughn scores. Sal Frelick to 2nd.
Brice Turang singles on a ground ball to right fielder Lars Nootbaar. Garrett Mitchell scores. Jackson Chourio to 3rd.
Wyatt Langford singles on a line drive to left fielder Jose Siri. Alejandro Osuna scores.
Jo Adell singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Alejandro Osuna. Nolan Schanuel scores. Jorge Soler to 2nd.
Ezequiel Duran homers (8) on a fly ball to center field. Brandon Nimmo scores.
Jorge Soler singles on a line drive to center fielder Cam Cauley. Mike Trout scores. Nolan Schanuel to 3rd.
Jo Adell lines out sharply to center fielder Evan Carter.
Nolan Arenado homers (11) on a fly ball to left center field.
Geraldo Perdomo singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jackson Merrill. Tommy Troy scores.
Miguel Andujar grounds into a double play, third baseman Nolan Arenado to second baseman Ketel Marte to first baseman Tim Tawa. Luis Campusano out at 2nd. Miguel Andujar out at 1st.
Jake Cronenworth grounds into a double play, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to second baseman Ketel Marte to first baseman Tim Tawa. Gavin Sheets out at 2nd. Jake Cronenworth out at 1st.
Manny Machado homers (19) on a fly ball to right field.
Willi Castro homers (7) on a fly ball to left center field. Hunter Goodman scores.
Luis Arraez doubles (21) on a ground ball to right fielder Tyler Freeman. Drew Cavanaugh scores. Heliot Ramos to 3rd.
Bryce Eldridge homers (8) on a fly ball to right field.

Tyler Freeman grounds into a double play, third baseman Casey Schmitt to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Bryce Eldridge. Hunter Goodman to 3rd. TJ Rumfield out at 2nd. Tyler Freeman out at 1st.
Casey Schmitt homers (18) on a fly ball to center field.
